projects.name: ask-adhi
projects.description: Terminal-style portfolio chatbot powered by Claude API with RAG over a personal knowledge base and structured tool calling. Built in three agile phases using spec-driven development with Claude Code.
highlights: RAG over resume using Supabase pgvector and Voyage AI embeddings
Claude tool-calling orchestration with structured tools
Terminal aesthetic with randomised accent color per session
Spec-driven development with Claude Code across three phases

projects.name: HawkerAI
projects.description: Singapore hawker dish calorie analyser using Claude Vision API and the HPB nutrition database. Upload a photo of a hawker meal and get an estimated calorie count.
highlights: Portfolio project demonstrating applied AI engineering

projects.name: LinkedIn Post Pipeline
projects.description: Multi-agent pipeline for generating LinkedIn posts using CrewAI and the Anthropic Claude API. Demonstrates multi-agent orchestration beyond single-model calls.
highlights: Demonstrates agentic AI engineering beyond single-model calls

projects.name: Tiny Tamagotchi
projects.description: Virtual pet app built for the DeepLearning.AI 7-Day Learner Challenge, submitted April 2025. Built using spec-driven development via Claude Code.
highlights: Spec-driven development workflow with Claude Code

projects.name: MCP Servers (Internal, CA-CIB Singapore)
projects.description: Engineered MCP servers for Jira and GitLab, enabling AI-assisted developer workflows across multiple teams at Crédit Agricole CIB Singapore. One of the first agentic AI tooling initiatives at the bank.
highlights: One of the first agentic AI tooling initiatives at CA-CIB Singapore

experience.focus: Initial Margin calculation engine (SIMM/OTC derivatives), MCP server engineering (Jira and GitLab), Apache Spark pipeline optimisation, Spring Boot microservices, Kafka event-driven architecture, WPF-to-React migration using strangler fig pattern.
Built a patient data ingestion pipeline transforming high-volume records into OMOP Common Data Model format in SQL Server. Batch scheduling via Crontab, modular ETL architecture.
